title: Don't Sleep
description: If a player needs the night on a multiplayer server, they can use a command to remind other players not to sleep.
body:
# Don't Sleep **Download: [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dont_sleep/version/latest)** If a player needs the night on a multiplayer server, they can remind others not to sleep bu using the command
`/trigger Dont_Sleep`! ## Features - Displayes who is sleeping in chat. - Players can toggle if they need the night using the command `/trigger Dont_Sleep`! - Automatically toggles off in the morning or if the player people sleeps/leaves. - If a player sleeps while the toggle is active, they will hear an alarm and see bold text telling them that someone needs the night. ## Wiki #### Installing: Insert the zip file into your datapacks folder. #### Uninstalling: Run the command `/function dont_sleep:uninstall` and delete the zip file. #### Commands: | Command | Descriptions | | --- | --- | | ```/function dont_sleep:uninstall``` | Uninstalls datapack | ## Preview
